origin.meaning: 古人画一个圆圈加点表示太阳

characters.story_cn: 太阳公公每天早早起床，照亮大地。圆圆的太阳像大火球，带来温暖和光明。
characters.story_en: Grandpa Sun wakes early each day, lighting up the earth. The round sun is like a big fireball bringing warmth and light.

origin.meaning: 古人画弯弯的形状表示月亮

characters.story_cn: 夜晚，弯弯的月亮挂在天空像一艘小船，小星星们围着月亮姐姐眨眼睛。
characters.story_en: At night the crescent moon hangs like a small boat. Little stars twinkle around Sister Moon.

origin.meaning: 古人画三个山峰表示山

characters.story_cn: 高高的山峰直插云霄，小松鼠住在山上，每天在树林里跳来跳去。
characters.story_en: Tall peaks reach into the clouds. A little squirrel lives on the mountain, jumping among trees.
words: 高山 gāo shān · High mountain

origin.meaning: 古人画流动的波浪表示水

characters.story_cn: 哗啦啦小溪在唱歌，水滴从高处落下溅起美丽水花，小鱼在水里游来游去。
characters.story_en: Splash splash the stream sings, water drops fall high making splashes, little fish swims happily.
words: 喝水 hē shuǐ · Drink water
河水 hé shuǐ · River water

origin.meaning: 古人画火焰形状表示火

characters.story_cn: 篝火晚会开始了！火焰跳动像在跳舞。火可以做饭取暖，但小朋友不能玩火！
characters.story_en: Campfire party begins! Flames dance. Fire cooks and keeps warm, but kids must never play with fire!
words: 大火 dà huǒ · Big fire
灭火 miè huǒ · Extinguish fire

origin.meaning: 古人画一个人头顶上的空间表示天

characters.story_cn: 蓝蓝的天空飘着白云，小鸟在天空中自由飞翔。天空真大真美啊！
characters.story_en: White clouds float in blue sky, birds fly freely. The sky is so big and beautiful!
words: 天天 tiān tiān · Every day

origin.meaning: 古人画云朵形状表示云

characters.story_cn: 白云像棉花糖飘在天上。乌云来了就要下雨，云朵变化无穷真有趣！
characters.story_en: White clouds float like cotton candy. When dark clouds come rain follows. Clouds change endlessly!
words: 白云 bái yún · White cloud
乌云 wū yún · Dark cloud

origin.meaning: 古人画水滴从天上落下表示雨

characters.story_cn: 小雨滴滴答答落下来，花儿喝足了水开得更鲜艳。下雨天可以踩水洼，好开心！
characters.story_en: Light rain falls patter-patter. Flowers drink enough water and bloom brighter. Splashing puddles is fun!

origin.meaning: 古人画风吹动的形状表示风

characters.story_cn: 呼呼呼，风儿吹过树叶沙沙响。春风温暖，秋风凉爽，风真神奇！
characters.story_en: Whoo whoo, wind blows through trees making rustling sounds. Spring wind is warm, autumn wind is cool!
words: 大风 dà fēng · Big wind
风吹 fēng chuī · Wind blows
春风 chūn fēng · Spring wind

origin.meaning: 古人画雨变成白色颗粒表示雪

characters.story_cn: 冬天来了，白雪飘下来，大地盖上白色棉被。小朋友堆雪人打雪仗，好开心！
characters.story_en: Winter arrives, snowflakes fall, earth covers with white quilt. Kids build snowmen and snowball fights!
words: 白雪 bái xuě · White snow

origin.meaning: 古人画花草形状表示花

characters.story_cn: 春天来了，花儿开了！红的、黄的、紫的，五颜六色的花儿真美丽！
characters.story_en: Spring comes, flowers bloom! Red, yellow, purple - colorful flowers are so beautiful!
words: 鲜花 xiān huā · Fresh flower

origin.meaning: 古人画小草形状表示草

characters.story_cn: 绿绿的小草长在地上，小羊喜欢吃草。草地上可以踢球玩耍！
characters.story_en: Green grass grows on the ground, little sheep like to eat grass. We can play ball on the grass!
words: 小草 xiǎo cǎo · Little grass
青草 qīng cǎo · Green grass

origin.meaning: 古人画树木形状表示树

characters.story_cn: 大树高高，树叶茂密。小鸟在树上筑巢，小朋友在树下乘凉。
characters.story_en: Big trees are tall with dense leaves. Birds build nests in trees, children rest under them.
words: 大树 dà shù · Big tree

origin.meaning: 古人画树干和树枝表示木

characters.story_cn: 木头可以做成桌椅、房子。木是树的一部分，很有用！
characters.story_en: Wood can be made into tables, chairs, and houses. Wood is part of trees, very useful!
words: 木椅 mù yǐ · Wooden chair
木门 mù mén · Wooden door

origin.meaning: 两个木在一起表示很多树

characters.story_cn: 森林里有很多树，小动物们住在里面。树林里空气清新，真舒服！
characters.story_en: The forest has many trees, little animals live inside. The air in the forest is fresh and comfortable!
words: 林间 lín jiān · Among trees

origin.meaning: 古人画树枝上的叶片表示叶

characters.story_cn: 树叶绿绿的，秋天变黄飘落。叶子可以给小虫子当家。
characters.story_en: Leaves are green, turning yellow and falling in autumn. Leaves can be homes for little bugs.
words: 树叶 shù yè · Tree leaf
绿叶 lǜ yè · Green leaf
落叶 luò yè · Fallen leaf

origin.meaning: 古人画树上的果实表示果

characters.story_cn: 苹果、香蕉、橘子都是水果。水果甜甜的，小朋友都爱吃！
characters.story_en: Apples, bananas, oranges are all fruits. Fruits are sweet, children love to eat them!
words: 果树 guǒ shù · Fruit tree

origin.meaning: 古人画鸟的形状表示鸟

characters.story_cn: 小鸟在天空中飞翔，唱着美妙的歌。鸟妈妈照顾小鸟宝宝，真温馨！
characters.story_en: Little birds fly in the sky, singing beautiful songs. Bird mom takes care of baby birds, so warm!
words: 小鸟 xiǎo niǎo · Little bird
飞鸟 fēi niǎo · Flying bird

origin.meaning: 古人画鱼的形状表示鱼

characters.story_cn: 小鱼在水里游来游去，鱼鳞闪闪发光。钓鱼是很有趣的活动！
characters.story_en: Little fish swim in water, scales shining. Fishing is a fun activity!
words: 小鱼 xiǎo yú · Little fish

origin.meaning: 古人画马的形状表示马

characters.story_cn: 马儿跑得很快，可以帮人运输东西。骑马是一项有趣的运动！
characters.story_en: Horses run fast, helping people transport things. Horse riding is a fun sport!
words: 小马 xiǎo mǎ · Little horse
骑马 qí mǎ · Ride horse
马车 mǎ chē · Horse cart

origin.meaning: 古人画牛头形状表示牛

characters.story_cn: 牛是勤劳的动物，可以帮农民耕田。牛奶很有营养！
characters.story_en: Cows are hardworking animals, helping farmers plow fields. Milk is very nutritious!
words: 小牛 xiǎo niú · Little cow
黄牛 huáng niú · Yellow cow

origin.meaning: 古人画羊头形状表示羊

characters.story_cn: 小羊喜欢吃草，羊毛可以做衣服。羊儿温顺可爱！
characters.story_en: Little sheep like eating grass, wool can make clothes. Sheep are gentle and cute!
words: 小羊 xiǎo yáng · Little sheep

origin.meaning: 古人画狗的形状表示狗

characters.story_cn: 小狗是人类的好朋友，会看家、会玩耍。狗狗忠诚可爱！
characters.story_en: Dogs are human's good friends, guarding homes and playing. Dogs are loyal and cute!
words: 小狗 xiǎo gǒu · Little dog
宠物狗 chǒng wù gǒu · Pet dog

origin.meaning: 古人画猫的形状表示猫

characters.story_cn: 小猫咪喵喵叫，喜欢抓老鼠。猫咪软软的，抱起来很舒服！
characters.story_en: Little cats meow, like catching mice. Cats are soft, holding them is comfortable!
words: 小猫 xiǎo māo · Little cat
宠物猫 chǒng wù māo · Pet cat

origin.meaning: 古人画虫子形状表示虫

characters.story_cn: 小虫子在草丛里爬，蝴蝶是美丽的虫子。虫子世界很奇妙！
characters.story_en: Little bugs crawl in grass, butterflies are beautiful insects. The insect world is amazing!
words: 小虫 xiǎo chóng · Little bug

origin.meaning: 古人画站立的人形表示人

characters.story_cn: 人是世界上最聪明的动物，会说话、会思考、会创造。
characters.story_en: Humans are the smartest animals, can speak, think, and create.
words: 好人 hǎo rén · Good person

origin.meaning: 古人画手掌形状表示手

characters.story_cn: 手可以做很多事情：写字、画画、吃饭、玩耍。保护小手很重要！
characters.story_en: Hands can do many things: write, draw, eat, play. Protecting little hands is important!
words: 小手 xiǎo shǒu · Little hand
双手 shuāng shǒu · Two hands
握手 wò shǒu · Shake hands

origin.meaning: 古人画嘴巴形状表示口

characters.story_cn: 嘴巴可以吃饭、说话、唱歌。微笑是最美的表情！
characters.story_en: Mouth can eat, speak, sing. Smile is the most beautiful expression!
words: 开口 kāi kǒu · Open mouth

origin.meaning: 古人画眼睛形状表示目

characters.story_cn: 眼睛可以看世界，看书、看电视、看风景。保护眼睛很重要！
characters.story_en: Eyes can see the world, read books, watch TV, see scenery. Protecting eyes is important!

origin.meaning: 古人画耳朵形状表示耳

characters.story_cn: 耳朵可以听声音，听音乐、听故事。耳朵是很重要的器官！
characters.story_en: Ears can hear sounds, listen to music, hear stories. Ears are important organs!
words: 耳目 ěr mù · Eyes and ears

origin.meaning: 古人画心脏形状表示心

characters.story_cn: 心脏跳动让血液流动。心也代表感情，开心、伤心都是心的感受。
characters.story_en: Heart beats to keep blood flowing. Heart also represents feelings - happy, sad are all heart's feelings.
words: 心里 xīn lǐ · In heart

origin.meaning: 古人画脚形状表示足

characters.story_cn: 脚可以走路、跑步、跳绳。保护小脚，穿合适的鞋子！
characters.story_en: Feet can walk, run, jump rope. Protect little feet, wear proper shoes!

origin.meaning: 古人画人头形状表示头

characters.story_cn: 头里有大脑，思考问题。头上有眼睛、耳朵、嘴巴、鼻子。
characters.story_en: Head has brain for thinking. Head has eyes, ears, mouth, nose.

origin.meaning: 古人画一横表示数字一

characters.story_cn: 一是最小的数字，一棵树、一只鸟、一朵花。
characters.story_en: One is the smallest number - one tree, one bird, one flower.

origin.meaning: 古人画两横表示数字二

characters.story_cn: 二是两个东西，两只小鸟、两个苹果。
characters.story_en: Two means two things - two birds, two apples.

origin.meaning: 古人画三横表示数字三

characters.story_cn: 三是三个东西，三只小猪、三朵花。
characters.story_en: Three means three things - three little pigs, three flowers.
words: 三心二意 sān xīn èr yì · Half-hearted

origin.meaning: 古人画四条线或方框表示数字四

characters.story_cn: 四是四个东西，四季、四方。
characters.story_en: Four means four things - four seasons, four directions.
words: 四季 sì jì · Four seasons

origin.meaning: 古人画交叉形状表示数字五

characters.story_cn: 五是五个东西，五根手指、五颜六色。
characters.story_en: Five means five things - five fingers, colorful.
words: 五彩 wǔ cǎi · Five colors

origin.meaning: 古人画房屋形状表示数字六

characters.story_cn: 六是六个东西，六边形。
characters.story_en: Six means six things - hexagon.

origin.meaning: 古人画十字加弯曲表示数字七

characters.story_cn: 七是七个东西，七彩虹。
characters.story_en: Seven means seven things - rainbow has seven colors.
words: 七彩 qī cǎi · Seven colors

origin.meaning: 古人画分开的两笔表示数字八

characters.story_cn: 八是八个东西，八仙过海。
characters.story_en: Eight means eight things - eight immortals cross the sea.
words: 八方 bā fāng · Eight directions

origin.meaning: 古人画弯曲形状表示数字九

characters.story_cn: 九是九个东西，九九重阳。
characters.story_en: Nine means nine things - Double Ninth Festival.
words: 九九 jiǔ jiǔ · Nine nine

origin.meaning: 古人画十字表示数字十

characters.story_cn: 十是十个东西，十全十美。
characters.story_en: Ten means ten things - perfect.

origin.meaning: 古人画指示符号表示上方

characters.story_cn: 小鸟飞上天空，气球飘上高空。上就是高高的方向。
characters.story_en: Birds fly up to sky, balloons float up high. Up means the high direction.
words: 上山 shàng shān · Go up mountain
上课 shàng kè · Attend class

origin.meaning: 古人画指示符号表示下方

characters.story_cn: 小虫爬下地面，雨滴落下天空。下就是低低的方向。
characters.story_en: Bugs crawl down to ground, raindrops fall down from sky. Down means the low direction.
words: 下山 xià shān · Go down mountain
下课 xià kè · Class ends

origin.meaning: 古人画左手形状表示左

characters.story_cn: 左手拿东西，左脚走路。左就是身体的一边。
characters.story_en: Left hand holds things, left foot walks. Left is one side of the body.
words: 左边 zuǒ biān · Left side
左手 zuǒ shǒu · Left hand
向左 xiàng zuǒ · To left
左右 zuǒ yòu · Left and right

origin.meaning: 古人画右手形状表示右

characters.story_cn: 右手写字，右脚踢球。右就是身体的另一边。
characters.story_en: Right hand writes, right foot kicks ball. Right is the other side of the body.
words: 右边 yòu biān · Right side
右手 yòu shǒu · Right hand
向右 xiàng yòu · To right
左右 zuǒ yòu · Left and right

origin.meaning: 古人画旗帜在中间表示中

characters.story_cn: 中间是最中心的位置。中国是我们的国家。
characters.story_en: Middle is the center position. China is our country.

origin.meaning: 古人画太阳升起的方向表示东

characters.story_cn: 太阳从东方升起，东方是太阳出来的方向。
characters.story_en: Sun rises from the east, east is where the sun comes out.
words: 东边 dōng biān · East side
东风 dōng fēng · East wind

origin.meaning: 古人画太阳落下的方向表示西

characters.story_cn: 太阳从西方落下，西方是太阳消失的方向。
characters.story_en: Sun sets in the west, west is where the sun disappears.
words: 西边 xī biān · West side
西风 xī fēng · West wind

origin.meaning: 古人画房屋朝向表示南

characters.story_cn: 南方天气温暖，南方有很多热带水果。
characters.story_en: South has warm weather, south has many tropical fruits.
words: 南边 nán biān · South side
南极 nán jí · South Pole
南风 nán fēng · South wind

origin.meaning: 古人画背靠背的人表示北

characters.story_cn: 北方天气寒冷，北方有美丽的雪景。
characters.story_en: North has cold weather, north has beautiful snow scenery.
words: 北边 běi biān · North side
北极 běi jí · North Pole
北风 běi fēng · North wind

origin.meaning: 古人画武器形状表示我

characters.story_cn: 我是小朋友，我爱学习，我爱玩耍。
characters.story_en: I am a child, I love learning, I love playing.
words: 小我 xiǎo wǒ · Little me

origin.meaning: 古人画人加指示表示你

characters.story_cn: 你是我的好朋友，我们一起玩吧！
characters.story_en: You are my good friend, let's play together!

origin.meaning: 古人画人加指示表示他

characters.story_cn: 他是小明，他喜欢踢足球。
characters.story_en: He is Xiao Ming, he likes playing soccer.

origin.meaning: 古人画女加指示表示她

characters.story_cn: 她是小红，她喜欢画画。
characters.story_en: She is Xiao Hong, she likes drawing.
words: 她人 tā rén · She person

origin.meaning: 父亲加巴音表示爸

characters.story_cn: 爸爸爱我，爸爸工作辛苦。我爱爸爸！
characters.story_en: Father loves me, father works hard. I love father!

origin.meaning: 母亲加马音表示妈

characters.story_cn: 妈妈爱我，妈妈照顾我。我爱妈妈！
characters.story_en: Mother loves me, mother takes care of me. I love mother!

origin.meaning: 父亲加耶音表示爷

characters.story_cn: 爷爷爱我，爷爷讲故事。我爱爷爷！
characters.story_en: Grandpa loves me, grandpa tells stories. I love grandpa!
words: 爷孙 yé sūn · Grandpa and grandchild

origin.meaning: 女性加乃音表示奶

characters.story_cn: 奶奶爱我，奶奶做饭好吃。我爱奶奶！
characters.story_en: Grandma loves me, grandma cooks delicious food. I love grandma!
words: 奶粉 nǎi fěn · Milk powder
奶奶家 nǎi nai jiā · Grandma's home

origin.meaning: 古人画人走路形状表示走

characters.story_cn: 小朋友学会走路了！走路上学，走路回家。
characters.story_en: Children learn to walk! Walk to school, walk home.
words: 走开 zǒu kāi · Go away
走出 zǒu chū · Walk out
走进 zǒu jìn · Walk in

origin.meaning: 足加包音表示跑

characters.story_cn: 跑步比赛真有趣！小朋友跑得很快。
characters.story_en: Running race is fun! Children run very fast.
words: 跑车 pǎo chē · Sports car
跑开 pǎo kāi · Run away
跑进 pǎo jìn · Run in

origin.meaning: 足加兆音表示跳

characters.story_cn: 跳绳、跳高、跳远都是运动。小朋友跳得高！
characters.story_en: Jump rope, high jump, long jump are sports. Children jump high!
words: 跳绳 tiào shéng · Jump rope
跳高 tiào gāo · High jump
跳远 tiào yuǎn · Long jump

origin.meaning: 口加乞音表示吃

characters.story_cn: 吃饭时间到了！吃蔬菜、吃水果，健康饮食。
characters.story_en: Time to eat! Eat vegetables, eat fruits, healthy diet.
words: 吃饭 chī fàn · Eat meal
吃掉 chī diào · Eat up
吃糖 chī táng · Eat candy

origin.meaning: 口加曷音表示喝

characters.story_cn: 喝水、喝牛奶、喝果汁。多喝水身体好！
characters.story_en: Drink water, drink milk, drink juice. Drink more water for good health!
words: 喝水 hē shuǐ · Drink water
喝奶 hē nǎi · Drink milk
喝完 hē wán · Finish drinking
喝汤 hē tāng · Drink soup

origin.meaning: 手在目上表示看

characters.story_cn: 看书、看电视、看风景。眼睛看世界！
characters.story_en: Read books, watch TV, see scenery. Eyes see the world!
words: 看书 kàn shū · Read book

origin.meaning: 口加斤音表示听

characters.story_cn: 听音乐、听故事、听老师讲课。耳朵听声音！
characters.story_en: Listen to music, hear stories, listen to teacher. Ears hear sounds!
words: 听歌 tīng gē · Listen to song

origin.meaning: 口加兑音表示说

characters.story_cn: 说话要礼貌，说谢谢、说你好。嘴巴说话！
characters.story_en: Speak politely, say thank you, say hello. Mouth speaks!

origin.meaning: 竹夭表示笑

characters.story_cn: 开心就笑，微笑是最美的表情。笑一笑，十年少！
characters.story_en: Laugh when happy, smile is the most beautiful expression. Smile makes you younger!
words: 大笑 dà xiào · Laugh loud
笑一笑 xiào yī xiào · Smile

origin.meaning: 两个口加犬表示哭

characters.story_cn: 伤心会哭，哭完要勇敢。小朋友不哭，要坚强！
characters.story_en: Cry when sad, be brave after crying. Children don't cry, be strong!
words: 大哭 dà kū · Cry loud
哭声 kū shēng · Crying sound
哭脸 kū liǎn · Crying face

origin.meaning: 心加受表示爱

characters.story_cn: 我爱爸爸妈妈，我爱学习，我爱生活。爱是最美好的感情！
characters.story_en: I love mom and dad, I love learning, I love life. Love is the best feeling!
words: 爱心 ài xīn · Love heart

origin.meaning: 心加相表示想

characters.story_cn: 我想去公园，我想吃冰淇淋。想就是心里希望。
characters.story_en: I want to go to park, I want ice cream. Think means hope in heart.

origin.meaning: 心加白表示怕

characters.story_cn: 不怕困难，勇敢面对。怕是正常的，但要克服！
characters.story_en: Don't fear difficulties, face bravely. Fear is normal, but overcome it!
words: 不怕 bù pà · Not afraid

origin.meaning: 乐器形状表示乐

characters.story_cn: 快乐学习，快乐生活。乐是最开心的心情！
characters.story_en: Happy learning, happy life. Joy is the happiest mood!

origin.meaning: 鼓加口表示喜

characters.story_cn: 喜欢学习，喜欢玩耍。喜是开心的心情！
characters.story_en: Like learning, like playing. Happy is joyful mood!
words: 喜事 xǐ shì · Happy event

origin.meaning: 心加奴表示怒

characters.story_cn: 生气时要冷静，不要发怒。怒是不好的心情。
characters.story_en: Be calm when angry, don't rage. Anger is bad mood.

origin.meaning: 古人画谷粒表示米

characters.story_cn: 米饭是主食，米可以做成很多好吃的。农民伯伯种米辛苦！
characters.story_en: Rice is staple food, rice can make many delicious things. Farmers work hard to grow rice!
words: 米粒 mǐ lì · Rice grain

origin.meaning: 古人画脸形状表示面

characters.story_cn: 面条好吃，面条有各种口味。面也可以指脸。
characters.story_en: Noodles are delicious, noodles have many flavors. Face also means noodles.
words: 方便面 fāng biàn miàn · Instant noodle
面食 miàn shí · Noodle food

origin.meaning: 古人画肉块表示肉

characters.story_cn: 肉有营养，猪肉、牛肉、鸡肉都好吃。
characters.story_en: Meat is nutritious, pork, beef, chicken are all delicious.
words: 吃肉 chī ròu · Eat meat

origin.meaning: 草加采表示菜

characters.story_cn: 蔬菜有营养，多吃蔬菜身体好！青菜、白菜、菠菜都好吃。
characters.story_en: Vegetables are nutritious, eat more vegetables for good health! Green veg, cabbage, spinach are delicious.
words: 青菜 qīng cài · Green veg

origin.meaning: 食加反表示饭

characters.story_cn: 吃饭时间到了！早饭、午饭、晚饭，三餐要按时。
characters.story_en: Time to eat! Breakfast, lunch, dinner, eat on time.
words: 吃饭 chī fàn · Eat meal

stories.title: 太阳和月亮
stories.content_cn: 从前，太阳和月亮是好朋友。太阳公公白天工作，给大地带来光明和温暖。月亮姐姐晚上工作，让夜晚不再黑暗。有一天，他们在黄昏见面了，天空变成了美丽的橙红色，那就是美丽的晚霞！太阳说：'我给大家阳光。'月亮说：'我给大家美梦。'太阳和月亮轮流守护着我们的世界。
stories.content_en: Once upon a time the Sun and Moon were good friends. Grandpa Sun worked by day bringing light and warmth. Sister Moon worked by night making darkness bright. One day they met at dusk, and the sky turned orange-red — that is the beautiful sunset! Sun said: I give sunlight to everyone. Moon said: I give sweet dreams to everyone. Sun and Moon take turns guarding our world.

stories.title: 水的旅行
stories.content_cn: 小雨滴从天上落下来，落在小溪里。小溪流向大河，大河流向大海。小鱼在水里游来游去，小虾在水里跳来跳去。水滴说：'我要去大海！'大海说：'欢迎你！'太阳出来，把水变成云，云又变成雨，水又开始新的旅行。
stories.content_en: Little raindrops fall from sky into streams. Streams flow to rivers, rivers flow to the sea. Little fish swim in water, little shrimp jump in water. Water drop says: I want to go to the sea! Sea says: Welcome! Sun comes out, turns water into clouds, clouds become rain, water starts new journey.

stories.title: 森林小伙伴
stories.content_cn: 森林里住着很多小动物。小松鼠住在树上，小鸟在树枝上唱歌，小兔子在草地上跳。一天，小松鼠说：'我们一起玩吧！'小鸟说：'好呀！'小兔子说：'我来跳绳！'森林里充满了欢笑声。
stories.content_en: Many little animals live in the forest. Little squirrel lives in tree, little bird sings on branch, little rabbit jumps on grass. One day, squirrel says: Let's play together! Bird says: OK! Rabbit says: I'll jump rope! Forest is full of laughter.

stories.title: 数字奇遇
stories.content_cn: 数字王国里住着一到十。一是最小的，十是最大的。一天，三说：'我们排队吧！'一站在最前面，十站在最后面。二说：'我和三在一起就是五！'五说：'我和五在一起就是十！'数字们开心地玩着。
stories.content_en: Number kingdom has one to ten. One is smallest, ten is biggest. One day, three says: Let's line up! One stands first, ten stands last. Two says: Me and three make five! Five says: Me and five make ten! Numbers play happily.

stories.title: 我的一家
stories.content_cn: 我家有爸爸、妈妈、爷爷、奶奶和我。爸爸工作辛苦，妈妈照顾我。爷爷讲故事，奶奶做饭好吃。我爱我的家人，我们一家人很幸福。
stories.content_en: My family has dad, mom, grandpa, grandma and me. Dad works hard, mom takes care of me. Grandpa tells stories, grandma cooks delicious food. I love my family, we are happy together.

stories.title: 颜色的世界
stories.content_cn: 世界有很多颜色。太阳是红色的，天空是蓝色的，草地是绿色的，云是白色的。花有红的、黄的、紫的。小朋友说：'世界真美丽！'
stories.content_en: World has many colors. Sun is red, sky is blue, grass is green, clouds are white. Flowers have red, yellow, purple. Children say: World is so beautiful!

stories.title: 在山上玩
stories.content_cn: 小朋友去山上玩。山很高，树很多。小鸟在树上唱歌，小羊在草地上吃草。小朋友爬上山顶，看到远处的风景。山真好玩！
stories.content_en: Children go to play on mountain. Mountain is high, trees are many. Birds sing on trees, sheep eat grass on grassland. Children climb to top, see distant scenery. Mountain is fun!

stories.title: 下雨啦
stories.content_cn: 今天下雨了！小雨滴滴答答落下来。小朋友撑着雨伞，穿着雨衣。雨停了，彩虹出来了！红橙黄绿青蓝紫，彩虹真美丽！
stories.content_en: Today is raining! Little raindrops fall patter-patter. Children hold umbrellas, wear raincoats. Rain stops, rainbow comes out! Red orange yellow green blue purple, rainbow is beautiful!

radicals.name: 月字旁
radicals.meaning: 与月亮、时间、身体部位有关
radicals.meaning_en: Related to moon, time, body parts

idioms.meaning_en: Wholeheartedly, with single-minded focus
idioms.story: 小明一心一意地画画，终于画出了美丽的彩虹。
idioms.story_en: Xiao Ming painted wholeheartedly and finally created a beautiful rainbow.

idioms.meaning_en: Time flies like a shuttle
idioms.story: 日月如梭，转眼间小朋友们都长大了。
idioms.story_en: Time flies, and in a blink the children have grown up.

idioms.meaning_en: Beautiful scenery with clear water and green mountains
idioms.story: 这里的山清水秀，小鸟在树林里唱歌。
idioms.story_en: The scenery here is beautiful, birds sing in the forest.

idioms.meaning_en: Gentle wind and beautiful sunshine
idioms.story: 今天风和日丽，我们去公园玩吧！
idioms.story_en: Today is sunny and breezy, let's go to the park!

idioms.meaning_en: Birds singing and flowers fragrant
idioms.story: 春天来了，鸟语花香，到处都是美丽的景色。
idioms.story_en: Spring is here, birds sing and flowers bloom beautifully.

idioms.meaning_en: Dancing with joy, very happy
idioms.story: 收到礼物，小朋友手舞足蹈，开心极了！
idioms.story_en: Receiving the gift, the child danced with joy!

idioms.meaning_en: Overjoyed, heart bursting with happiness
idioms.story: 考试得了满分，小明心花怒放。
idioms.story_en: Getting full marks, Xiao Ming was overjoyed.

idioms.meaning_en: Success immediately upon arrival
idioms.story: 祝你马到成功，考试顺利！
idioms.story_en: Wish you immediate success in your exam!

idioms.meaning_en: Success through hard work, like a fish leaping over the dragon gate
idioms.story: 努力学习，就能鱼跃龙门，考上好学校！
idioms.story_en: Study hard and you can succeed like a fish leaping over the dragon gate!

idioms.meaning_en: Adding fuel to the fire, making things worse
idioms.story: 吵架时不要火上浇油，要冷静说话。
idioms.story_en: Don't add fuel to the fire when arguing, speak calmly.

idioms.meaning_en: Persistence leads to success, like water drops piercing stone
idioms.story: 水滴石穿，每天学一点，就能学会很多汉字！
idioms.story_en: Like water drops piercing stone, learning a little each day leads to mastery!

idioms.meaning: 事情已经发生，无法改变
idioms.meaning_en: The wood has become a boat, things cannot be changed
idioms.story: 木已成舟，我们要接受结果，继续努力。
idioms.story_en: What's done is done, we must accept and continue working hard.

idioms.meaning_en: A sea of people, very crowded
idioms.story: 节日时公园里人山人海，热闹极了！
idioms.story_en: During festivals, the park is crowded with people!

idioms.meaning_en: Speaking endlessly like a flowing river
idioms.story: 老师口若悬河，讲课生动有趣。
idioms.story_en: The teacher speaks fluently, making lessons interesting.

idioms.meaning_en: Staring intently without blinking
idioms.story: 小朋友目不转睛地看着动画片。
idioms.story_en: The child stared intently at the cartoon.

idioms.meaning_en: Beautiful flowers and full moon, perfect happiness
idioms.story: 中秋节花好月圆，家人团聚真开心！
idioms.story_en: Mid-Autumn Festival brings beautiful flowers and full moon, family reunion is joyful!

idioms.meaning: 天气好，适合农作物生长
idioms.meaning_en: Good weather for crops, favorable conditions
idioms.story: 今年风调雨顺，农民伯伯很高兴。
idioms.story_en: This year has good weather, the farmers are happy.

idioms.meaning_en: Clouds clear and fog disperses, problems resolved
idioms.story: 经过努力，云开雾散，问题解决了！
idioms.story_en: After hard work, the clouds cleared and problems were solved!

idioms.meaning_en: Spring warmth and flowers blooming
idioms.story: 春暖花开，我们去郊游吧！
idioms.story_en: Spring is warm and flowers bloom, let's go on a trip!

idioms.meaning_en: Cool and refreshing autumn weather
idioms.story: 秋高气爽，天空特别蓝！
idioms.story_en: Autumn is cool and refreshing, the sky is especially blue!
